# CWE-1289 vulnerable: path equivalence bypass
lang: go
file: CWE-1289-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

// CWE-1289: Improper Validation of Unsafe Equivalence in Input.
// Vulnerable: resource id compared literally without filepath.Clean normalization.

import (
	"net/http"
	"path/filepath"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

func FetchSharedAsset() gin.HandlerFunc {
	root := "/srv/assets/public"
	return func(c *gin.Context) {
		requested := c.Param("path")
		if requested == "private/keys.pem" {
			c.JSON(http.StatusForbidden, gin.H{"error": "blocked"})
			return
		}
		full := filepath.Join(root, requested)
		c.File(full)
	}
}
